name: Tyra
description:
Dark chocolate, gorgeous thick fluffy hair, big green expressive eyes, turned up liver nose, and a straight topline. Short, cobby body. Sweet and loving little girl
She is barely old enough for her first show, but she won 1st in the Toy group!
Very outgoing and she had lots of fun. She's already leash trained and rides in the car like a champ. She is listed with full AKC registration.

name: Nico
description:
This little guy is solid chocolate, without any white on him.
He was born April 11th. He already has thick beautiful hair. A nice flat face and large expressive eyes. He is already started pad training and doing very well with it. 
AKC is available for an additional fee and can be added anytime the first year

name: Tippy Coachella
description:
Tippy is adorable and one of my favorites- she already has an adorable personality 
She has the short cobby body and short little legs- she has the extreme flat face with bright green eyes and tiny brown button nose 
She is ckc registered at this price but akc is available for an additional fee and can be added anytime the first year

name: Kimchi
description: This tiny little guy is Kimchi. He is solid chocolate with a white chest and a little white on his chin. He looks like a little baby seal.  He has a flat smooshie face, a tiny turned up button nose, and big round eyes. He is charting to be 6 pounds. Listed with CKC, but AKC is available for an additional fee.
